message:
feat(messaging): add quantitative obligation contracts (SLO-style)

QuantitativeContract with target latency/probability, RetryLaw (None,
Fixed, ExponentialBackoff, BudgetBounded), MonitoringPolicy (Passive,
Sampled, EProcess, Conformal), and QuantitativeContractError with 14
validation variants. 11 new tests including serde roundtrip.

Closes asupersync-8w83i.16.16.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
